name_en: M14239 White Flower Cherry Blossom (M81911). This Wallet On Chain Ivy handbag continues the narrative of the 2000s, playfully joining the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series. The Monogram canvas subtly highlights the vibrant colors of the cherry pattern, fully releasing the artist's kawaii power. Leather shoulder strap and chain allow for shoulder carrying. Dimensions: 23.5*4.3*12cm.
